readme:
# Cookiy MCP Skill

**AI-powered user research orchestration through natural language.**

Cookiy gives your AI agent user-research capabilities. It designs interview guides, conducts AI-moderated interviews with real or simulated participants, and generates insight reports — all through natural language.

## Features

- **MCP Server Integration** — Cookiy runs as an MCP server, making all research workflows available to Claude, Codex, Cursor, and OpenClaw agents.
- **Natural Language Interface** — Use plain language to orchestrate complex research workflows (study creation, interview guiding, report generation).
- **Multi-Platform Support** — Works with 8 different AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, VS Code, Windsurf, OpenClaw, Manus).
- **Complete Workflow Tools**
  - Study creation and configuration
  - AI-moderated interview orchestration  
  - Discussion guide editing and refinement
  - Participant recruitment workflows
  - Automated insight report generation

## Installation

### Prerequisites
- MCP server support in your coding agent
- Node.js or compatible runtime

### Quick Start

1. **Verify MCP is available**
   ```bash
   cookiy_introduce  # This call should succeed
   ```

2. **If MCP is missing, run the installer**
   ```bash
   npm install @cookiy/mcp-server
   ```

3. **Configure your agent** — Add Cookiy MCP to your agent's config:
   ```json
   {
     "mcpServers": {
       "cookiy": {
         "type": "http",
         "url": "https://s-api.cookiy.ai/mcp"
       }
     }
   }
   ```

## Usage

### Basic Workflow

```javascript
// 1. Create a research study
const study = await cookiy_create_study({
  title: "Mobile App UX Research",
  description: "User experience feedback on new navigation",
  participant_count: 20
});

// 2. Design interview guide
const guide = await cookiy_create_guide({
  study_id: study.id,
  topics: ["Navigation clarity", "Feature discoverability"],
  question_count: 15
});

// 3. Run AI interviews
const interviews = await cookiy_run_interviews({
  study_id: study.id,
  guide_id: guide.id,
  participant_type: "simulated"  // or "real"
});

// 4. Generate insights report
const report = await cookiy_generate_report({
  study_id: study.id,
  interviews: interviews,
  format: "markdown"
});
```

## Supported Agents

✅ OpenClaw  
✅ Claude Code  
✅ Codex  
✅ Cursor  
✅ Cline  
✅ VS Code  
✅ Windsurf  
✅ Manus

## Quality Assurance

- ✅ **13/13 tests passing** — Full test suite covering OAuth, client detection, asset resolution, platform-specific installation
- ✅ **Zero security vulnerabilities** — npm audit clean
- ✅ **Active maintenance** — Latest commit 2026-03-19
- ✅ **Production-ready** — Comprehensive error handling and logging
